title: P4 codereview: missing upper bound in set_position_fix_time
description: [codereview] Function at lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:532 only checks epoch floor. Must add upper bound and skew vs current time per task. Reject with clear error (e.g. new flag fix_time_rejected_future or specific errno). Update struct in adapter.h too.
